description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a prominent display screen set into a black, angular frame. The cabinet is adorned with vibrant fantasy-themed artwork, including mystical runes, colorful crystals, and illustrated characters on both side panels. The control panel is equipped with a joystick and several colored buttons, designed for interactive gameplay, and is positioned below the screen for easy access. The marquee at the top displays the game title 'Rune Defense' in bold, stylized yellow lettering, surrounded by magical symbols. The cabinet's exterior is primarily black with gold trim, accented by vivid purples, blues, greens, and oranges from the artwork. The overall build suggests a sturdy wooden or composite structure, typical of arcade machines, with a glass or plastic screen cover and metal or plastic controls.
description: A fantasy-themed upright arcade game cabinet with bold 'Rune Defense' marquee, colorful side artwork, and a joystick/button control panel. The cabinet is primarily black with gold trim and vibrant mystical graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, control panel with joystick and buttons, and the 'Rune Defense' marquee.
description_view_1: Left angled view highlighting the side panel artwork of a blue mystical character and rune symbols.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the back panel with multiple colorful crystal graphics and minimal branding.
description_view_3: Right angled view featuring a purple-robed character, more rune symbols, and the control panel's side.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a visible bezel around the display area.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and multiple colored buttons arranged in a cluster, with a red joystick and blue, purple, and green buttons.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the game title 'Rune Defense' in bold yellow text with magical rune symbols and a dark fantasy theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Side panels display fantasy-themed artwork, including illustrated mystical characters, colorful crystals, and rune symbols on a black background.
